title: Saber Squadron (disambiguation)
content:
'''Saber Squadron''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Saber Squadron (Imperial)|Saber Squadron]]'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Saber Squadron (Imperial)/Legends|Saber Squadron]]''', an elite [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]] unit created to protect the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]]
*'''[[Saber Squadron (Invid)|Saber Squadron]]''', one of the three [[True Invids|True Invid]] [[Clutch (fighter)|clutch]] squadrons
*'''[[Saber Squadron (Eclipse)|Saber Squadron]]''', found by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] for the [[Eclipse Station]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]
*'''[[Shadow Saber squadron]]'''

==See also==
*[[Saber (disambiguation)]]
